title: Marine Le Pen’s Court Battle Is Latest Clash Between Populists and Watchdogs
summary_full: The far-right leader’s battle with the French judiciary evokes standoffs across the populist world, including ones with President Trump and Nigel Farage.
summary_public: The far-right leader’s battle with the French judiciary evokes standoffs across the populist world, including ones with President Trump and Nigel Farage.
